object_added.role: Specifies the exact provenance certificate required before any baseline LCDM prediction vector can be promoted.

required_certificate_fields.description: Official ACT DR6 likelihood source URI and immutable commit or archive digest.
Official baseline LCDM parameter source, best-fit source, or reproducible chain/config source.
Executable CAMB/Cobaya command, environment, package versions, and input YAML/config digest.
Rule mapping CAMB/Cobaya output into the one-dimensional ACT DR6 CMB-only theory vector.
Proof that theory-vector entry i corresponds to ACT_DR6_PREDICTION_VECTOR_ORDERING_CERTIFICATE row index i.
Vector shape, dtype, and SHA256 digest matching the certified ACT DR6 CMB-only prediction-vector shape.
Explicit certificate that the vector is not copied from the observed ACT DR6 data vector.

current_blockers: No official baseline LCDM theory-vector artifact is present.
No official ACT/CAMB/Cobaya digest-bound execution output is present.
The prior shape-compatible candidate was rejected as a data-vector candidate, not a baseline theory vector.
promotion_rule: Only a completed provenance certificate with all required fields satisfied may allow construction of ACT_DR6_BASELINE_LCDM_PREDICTION_VECTOR.
does_not_prove: official ACT DR6 baseline LCDM theory-vector provenance certificate exists
baseline LCDM prediction vector is official
baseline LCDM prediction vector is physically correct
bound candidate is a baseline LCDM theory vector
ACT DR6 residual eigenspace empirical comparison has been run
dark matter phase transition is physically real
